svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="luban-call-flow" id="luban-call-flow"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-173" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="540" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="FRONT" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="前端应用层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="640" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ADMIN" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="管理后台 luban
(站点/页面/用户/系统设置)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="280" x="64" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="WEB" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="对外站点 luban-website
(Nuxt 3 SSR + Render)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="280" x="376" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BFFBOX" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eff6ff;strokeColor=#93c5fd;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="接入层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="640" x="40" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BFF" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="luban-bff
Node API Gateway
(认证注入 / 协议聚合 / 限流)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="280" x="220" y="222" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BEBOX" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="主后端层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="640" x="40" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BACKEND" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="luban-backend (Java)
Spring Boot + MyBatis
站点/页面/用户/系统设置原子接口" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="280" x="220" y="362" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DATA" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="存储层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="640" x="40" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DB" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;" value="MySQL
(业务真相源)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="140" x="260" y="478" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CACHE" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;" value="Redis
(缓存/热点加速)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="140" x="420" y="478" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="UIBOX" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#134e4a;spacingTop=6;" value="组件库与运行时" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="390" width="230" x="710" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="UI" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="luban-ui

Designer 设计器
Render 运行时渲染
(基础组件 + 低代码组件)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="194" x="728" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_ADMIN_BFF" edge="1" parent="1" source="ADMIN" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.25;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="BFF" value="/api/*
(需登录+权限)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_WEB_BFF" edge="1" parent="1" source="WEB" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.75;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="BFF" value="/api/public/*
(无需登录)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_BFF_BE" edge="1" parent="1" source="BFF" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="BACKEND" value="/backend/*
(BACKEND_BASE_URL + Header 上下文)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_BE_DB" edge="1" parent="1" source="BACKEND" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.35;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="DB"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_BE_CACHE" edge="1" parent="1" source="BACKEND" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.65;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="CACHE"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_UI_ADMIN" edge="1" parent="1" source="UI" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;exitX=0;exitY=0.25;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="ADMIN" value="被集成"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_UI_WEB" edge="1" parent="1" source="UI" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;exitX=0;exitY=0.75;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="WEB" value="被集成"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
